title: 2022 Bering Science released
summary: Along with our partners at the Alaska Ocean Observing System , IARC released the 2022 Bering Science. The report shares observations and research happening in and around the Bering Sea. This year’s report focuses on six themes: salmon, walrus, crab, halibut, seabirds and climate. The topics of this...
